summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of iteration 9 features (P0 Meta HMAC, P1 ticket-reply emails, P2 marketplace reviews, P2 A/B campaigns, P2 rich media). 20/20 backend tests pass; all critical frontend flows verified (A/B variants modal, A/B results modal, sessionStorage prefill, marketplace reviews modal, ⭐ rating display).

issues: React hydration warning: '<span> option cannot be a child of <main>' — likely a non-standard child inside a <select>; not blocking but should be cleaned up to avoid hydration mismatches.

action_items: Optional: clean up the <span> inside <select> children in Campaigns.jsx (hydration warning).
Optional: add data-testid attributes on key elements ('add-variant-btn', 'create-campaign-btn', 'reviews-modal', 'ab-results-modal') — currently selectors rely on visible text, which is fragile.
critical_code_review_comments: verify_meta_webhook_signature returns True when META_APP_SECRET is empty (dev-mode skip). Production gate is correctly enforced because META_APP_SECRET is set in /app/backend/.env. Consider explicit logger.warning when running with no secret.

_run_campaign uses random.Random(f'{cid}:{idx}') giving deterministic-per-recipient variant pick (good). However `recipients_remaining = recipients[already_sent:]` paired with `pick_variant(already_sent + offset)` recomputes the SAME variant on resume — also correct.

Marketplace _recompute_rating reads then writes — there is a small race window when two reviewers submit concurrently. For low traffic this is fine; for production-scale, switch to aggregation in a single update or use a lock.
support.py reply_to_ticket: send_email is wrapped in try/except (good), but if SMTP is slow, run_sync blocks each recipient sequentially; consider firing emails in BackgroundTasks for snappier UX.
reviews_recompute_rating divides by len(reviews) only when non-empty (good); avg=0 when empty (matches frontend expectation).
test_credentials: demo@test.com / demo1234 (tenant) and superadmin@wabridge.com / superadmin123 (super admin); META_APP_SECRET=demo_meta_secret_change_in_production already in /app/backend/.env
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_iter9 marketplace template, TEST_iter9 ab-runner campaign (4 recipients sent successfully — variant A:1, variant B:3 — all failed because recipients are not opted into Twilio sandbox, which is expected), TEST_iter9 plain + media-campaign + ab + media-runner test campaigns, plus a TEST_iter9 support ticket with 2 replies. All prefixed TEST_ for cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 P0/P1/P2 features ship cleanly. Backend reusable test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration9_p0_p2.py (20 tests, 14s runtime). Frontend Campaigns modal supports A/B variants (Add variant button, weights with red >100 indicator, per-variant message), Media URL input + media-type dropdown, sessionStorage 'wa_ai_campaign_draft' auto-opens modal with prefilled values. A/B results modal renders per-variant SENT/DELIVERED/FAILED + 'share of sends' (Winner badge only appears on the variant with highest delivered count — when delivered counts are 0/0, no Winner shown, which is correct). Marketplace cards display ⭐ avg-rating and count when rating_count > 0; Reviews button opens modal showing summary, write-form (when not author) and review list.
